titleStmt.title: SII 36.87: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 87. (A.R. No. 87 of 1910.) TIRUVEḶḶAṞAI, LALGUDI TALUK, TRICHINOPOLY DISTRICT. On the rock in front of the Jambunāthaśvāmi temple.

summary.p: Gift of ten kaḻañcus of gold by Kāsyapan Kēsavan Tiruvāṉaikkaluḍaiyan, a resident of Kīḻaichchēri for maintaining one perpetual lamp in the temple of Tiruvāṉaikkal-uḍaiyār at Tiruveḷḷaṟai, in Vaḍakarai-nāḍu, a subdivision of Tribhuvanamuḻuduḍai-vaḷanāḍu. The gold was received by seven sivabrāhmaṇas who had the right of temple service (kāṇi) and agreed to supervise the maintenance of lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrī vikkiramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu tiripuvanamuḻutu
ṭai vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakarai nāṭṭu tiruveḷḷaṟait tiruvāṉaikkalluṭaiyār ko
yilil kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrahmaṇar Ōmañcankūnan Uyyaninṟāṭuvāṉāna ti
ruvāṉaikkal paṭṭanum Ōmañcan paṟmanāpan tevarāna nāṟpatteṇṇā
yira paṭṭanum Ōmañcan cūriyan Antanāna dakṣiṇāmūtti paṭṭanum kāśyapan
anantan pañcanetiyāna tillaimūvāyira paṭṭanum kāśyapan ciṅkan nitta
teyamuṭaiyānāna tecaviṭaṅka paṭṭanum kāśyapan Aracu tiruveṇṇāval
paṭṭaṉum kāśyapan cīrāḷan tillai niṟaintānāṉa vikkiramacoḻa paṭṭanu
m Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūrk kīḻaiccerit tenkaṇṭattu kāśyapan ke
cavan tiruvāṉaikkalluṭaiyān Ittevarkku vaitta tirunontāviḷakku
Onṟukku nāṅkaḷ Upayamākak kaikkoṇṭa pon patin kaḻantu Ippon patin
kaḻaintum kaikkoṇṭu Ikkoyil Alakum kuṭamum koṇṭu pukkāṟ
cantrādittavaṟ Erikkak kaṭavomāka sammatittom Ivvaṉaivom
Itu panmāheśvarar rakṣai . §
Digital edition of SII 36.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
